summary: Iteration 13 - Document Folder Categories feature fully tested. Backend: 17/17 tests passed. Frontend: All folder browser elements verified (8 folder cards including 7 default + 1 custom 'Fatture Fornitori', Cartelle/Lista toggle, year filter, Nuova Categoria button).
passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/folder-categories - Returns 8 categories (7 default + 1 custom 'Fatture Fornitori')
✅ Default categories have correct structure (id, name, icon, color, is_default, order)
✅ Default categories marked with is_default=true
✅ Default categories have correct colors (red for Agencia Tributaria, blue for Seguridad Social, etc.)
✅ POST /api/folder-categories - Creates custom category with correct fields
✅ POST /api/folder-categories - Rejects duplicate category name
✅ DELETE /api/folder-categories/{id} - Cannot delete default category 'documenti'
✅ DELETE /api/folder-categories/{id} - Cannot delete any default categories
✅ DELETE /api/folder-categories/{id} - Can delete custom categories
✅ GET /api/clients/{id}/documents/by-folder - Returns correct structure (folders, total_documents, available_years)
✅ GET /api/clients/{id}/documents/by-folder - Has all 7 default categories
✅ GET /api/clients/{id}/documents/by-folder - Each folder has document_count and documents fields
✅ GET /api/clients/{id}/documents/by-folder?year=2025 - Year filter works
✅ PUT /api/documents/{id}/category - Endpoint exists and accepts folder_category/document_year
✅ Default categories have correct icons (landmark for Agencia Tributaria, etc.)
✅ Frontend: Archivio Documenti section present
✅ Frontend: Cartelle/Lista toggle buttons present and functional
✅ Frontend: 'Tutti gli anni' year filter dropdown present
✅ Frontend: 'Nuova Categoria' button present with data-testid
✅ Frontend: 8 folder cards visible (7 default + Fatture Fornitori)
✅ Frontend: All 7 default folders visible with correct names and icons
critical_code_review_comments: Folder categories implementation is clean with correct separation of default vs custom categories
DocumentFolderBrowser component correctly uses data-testid attributes for folders
AI service correctly integrates folder_category classification in the prompt
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration13_folder_categories.py - New test file for folder categories
seed_data_creation: TEST_ prefixed categories created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 13 verified all folder categories functionality: 1) Backend returns 7 default categories (Documenti, Agencia Tributaria, Seguridad Social, Ayuntamiento, Contratti, Atti, Registro Mercantil) with correct icons and colors. 2) Custom categories can be created (like 'Fatture Fornitori') but cannot duplicate default names. 3) Default categories CANNOT be deleted (returns 400 error). 4) Documents can be organized by folder_category and document_year. 5) Frontend shows folder browser in ClientDetail > Documenti tab with Cartelle/Lista toggle, year filter, and Nuova Categoria button. 6) All 8 folders (7 default + 1 custom) display correctly with icons.

folder_categories_api.description: GET /api/folder-categories returns 7 default + custom categories with correct structure

create_custom_category.description: POST /api/folder-categories creates custom category, rejects duplicates

delete_category_protection.description: DELETE /api/folder-categories/{id} blocks deletion of default categories

documents_by_folder.description: GET /api/clients/{id}/documents/by-folder returns folder structure with counts and year filter

folder_browser_ui.description: DocumentFolderBrowser shows 8 folders with toggle, year filter, and new category button
